sentences.text: "Well, really," said the Water-rat angrily, "you should have told me before."
"I think you should have said that at the start," he added.
If you had done that, I would not have listened to you, and I would have said 'Pooh,' like the critic.
However, I can say it now, so he shouted 'Pooh' loudly, then he whisked his tail and went back to his hole.
